price.src: reconstructed: Wisesheets EOD 2026-07-15 close $419.48, minus a reported same-day earnings-reaction decline of ~3.13% on 2026-07-16 (web search) -- NOT a confirmed EOD print, Wisesheets has no 2026-07-16 row yet. Lower confidence than usual; treat as directional.

multiple_bear.src: judgment -- unchanged trough-to-bear-high P/E range from prior update, anchored to Apr 2025 tariff-panic trough (~14x) and prior bear-case ceiling (~18x)

multiple_base.src: judgment -- unchanged normal P/E range from prior update

multiple_bull.src: judgment -- unchanged bull/structural-monopoly-re-rate P/E range from prior update

multiple_peer_median_asml_fpe.src: derived this session from ASML's own update: $1,815.27 price / $36.62 2026E consensus EPS -- the other irreplaceable AI chokepoint peer, useful context though not a P/E comp match for a foundry

price_targets_post_print.value: Goldman Sachs ADR $600 (from $550), another analyst $590 (from $490), average analyst target ~$520 (~17% upside from pre-print levels); Citi raised Taiwan-listed target to NT$3,800 from NT$2,875
price_targets_post_print.src: web search -- sell-side notes post Q2 2026 print

notes: Genuine beat-and-raise on every disclosed metric (revenue, GM, OM, EPS all above guide/consensus; capex guide raised ~$8-12B; FY26 USD revenue growth guide raised from >30% to slightly above 40%) plus a new $100B US investment pledge. But the stock did NOT re-rate up on it -- it round-tripped from a $477.57 pre-print high (2026-06-30) down through $419 (07-15) to an estimated ~$407 post-print (07-16), a 'sell the news' pattern on elevated pre-print expectations. Net effect on the forward multiple: price fell ~15% off its pre-print high while NTM EPS estimate rose ~9% (17.20->18.75), so the forward P/E actually COMPRESSED from ~27.8x (pre-print, near the top of the historical normal band) to ~21.7x (post-print, mid-normal-band) -- a healthier setup than before the print, not a worse one, even though the raw price is down. This is the single most important Layer-2 finding this quarter.
